cause: macOS /tmp cleanup removed file from volatile directory
fix: Moved template to tabiji/scripts/compare-shell-template.json, updated Python script to use Path(__file__).resolve().parent for relative path resolution

pattern: git push rejected: remote contains work that you do not have locally
patternRegex: git\ push\ rejected:\ remote\ contains\ work\ that\ you\ do\ not\ have\ locally
cause: Multiple sub-agents pushing concurrently cause remote ahead rejections
fix: Add git pull --rebase before git push in deployment scripts

cause: LLM output truncated or malformed JSON from AI generation
fix: Retry generation with same prompt — transient LLM output issue

cause: Cron delivery config missing to field or using channel: last for isolated sessions
fix: Set channel: slack AND to: channel-id in cron delivery config

pattern: Cron job in error state with lastError: Message failed
patternRegex: Cron\ job\ in\ error\ state\ with\ lastError:\ Message\ failed
cause: Cron error state blocks next run; disable+enable cycle clears error state
fix: openclaw cron disable <id> && openclaw cron enable <id>
